name: stockyard-secretscan
description: Detect and redact API keys, AWS credentials, tokens, and secrets in LLM requests and responses. TruffleHog-style pattern matching.

tools.name: secretscan_stats
tools.description: Get scan statistics: total scanned, detections by type, blocks/redactions.

tools.name: secretscan_test
tools.description: Test a text string for secret patterns without sending to LLM.

tools.name: secretscan_set_action
tools.description: Change what happens when a secret is detected.

tools.name: secretscan_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the SecretScan proxy is running and healthy.
